title: Evidence Module
description: A source repository that provides corpus artifacts, annotations, and analysis outputs to PPW. Owns the corpus/provenance/annotation layer; PPW owns the promoted claim/interpretation/score layer.

moduleId.description: Stable kebab-case identifier for this evidence module.

moduleType.description: deep-case: single-case evidence module; comparative: multi-case cross-case corpus module.

sourceRepository.description: URL or owner/repo identifier of the source repository (e.g. ashitaka-emishi/lincoln-metaphor-analysis).

sourceRepositoryRole.description: Role the source repository plays in the PPW evidence architecture.

description.description: Short description of what the module contains and its purpose.

caseIds.description: PPW case IDs this module contributes evidence for.

theoryIds.description: PPW theory IDs whose variables this module provides evidence for.

corpusIds.description: Corpus registry IDs managed by this module.

artifactClasses.description: Classes of artifacts this module holds.

provenanceStatus.description: Whether provenance documentation is complete for this module's artifacts.

rightsStatus.description: Copyright and rights status. open: permissively licensed; fair-use: passages cited under fair use; restricted: access-controlled; unknown: not yet assessed.

claimPromotionPolicy.description: Governs how draft claims from this module are promoted through PPW review gates.

sourceIssueMigrationStatus.description: Status of issue migration from this source repository to PPW.

lastImported.description: ISO 8601 date of the most recent import or sync from the source repository.

maintainerNotes.description: Free-text notes for module maintainers about integration state, known gaps, or upcoming work.
